sentence: I can't find my wallet. It's ____.
explanation: missing は「見つからない・行方不明の」という意味。walletが見つからないので missing が正解。

sentence: My sister wants to ____ a doctor in the future.
explanation: become は「〜になる」。将来医者になりたいので become が正解。

sentence: The movie was so ____ that everyone laughed.
explanation: funny は「おもしろい・おかしい」。みんなが笑ったので funny が正解。

sentence: Please ____ this letter to the post office.
explanation: deliver は「届ける・配達する」。手紙を郵便局に届けるので deliver が正解。

sentence: I was ____ to hear the good news.
explanation: excited は「ワクワクした・興奮した」。良いニュースを聞いて嬉しいので excited が正解。

sentence: He ____ his homework before dinner.
explanation: finished は「終わらせた」。夕食前に宿題を終えたので finished が正解。

sentence: We should ____ the environment for the future.
explanation: protect は「守る・保護する」。環境を守るべきなので protect が正解。

sentence: There are ____ students in the library today.
explanation: several は「いくつかの・数人の」。図書館に何人かの生徒がいるので several が正解。

sentence: I ____ my keys somewhere in the house.
explanation: lost は「なくした」。家のどこかで鍵をなくしたので lost が正解。

sentence: She ____ to study abroad next year.
explanation: plans は「計画する」。来年留学する予定なので plans が正解。

sentence: He ____ the mountain with his friends last weekend.
explanation: climbed は「登った」。山に登ったので climbed が正解。

sentence: The bus was very ____, so I had to stand.
explanation: crowded は「混んでいる」。立たなければならなかったので crowded が正解。

sentence: She ____ a letter from her grandmother yesterday.
explanation: received は「受け取った」。おばあちゃんから手紙を受け取ったので received が正解。

sentence: This book is very ____ among young people.
explanation: popular は「人気のある」。若者に人気なので popular が正解。

sentence: We need to ____ a decision by tomorrow.
explanation: make a decision は「決定する」という熟語。明日までに決めるので make が正解。

sentence: The ____ of this city is about 500,000 people.
explanation: population は「人口」。この街の人口は約50万人なので population が正解。

sentence: Don't forget to ____ off the light when you leave.
explanation: turn off は「消す」という熟語。電気を消すので turn が正解。

sentence: She ____ very hard for the math exam.
explanation: studied は「勉強した」。数学のテストのために一生懸命勉強したので studied が正解。

sentence: The weather ____ changed suddenly this afternoon.
explanation: suddenly は「突然」。今日の午後、天気が突然変わったので suddenly が正解。

sentence: He ____ his friend to the birthday party.
explanation: invited は「招待した」。友達を誕生日パーティーに招いたので invited が正解。

sentence: I'll ____ you up at the station at 3 p.m.
explanation: pick up は「迎えに行く」という熟語。3時に駅に迎えに行くので pick が正解。

sentence: We had a ____ time at the amusement park.
explanation: wonderful は「すばらしい」。遊園地で楽しい時間を過ごしたので wonderful が正解。

sentence: He ____ a lot of money on video games last month.
explanation: spent は「使った・費やした」。ゲームにたくさんのお金を使ったので spent が正解。

sentence: This store gives a 20% ____ on weekends.
explanation: discount は「割引」。週末に20%割引をするので discount が正解。

sentence: You should ____ for the book you want at the library.
explanation: look for は「〜を探す」という熟語。図書館で本を探すので look が正解。

sentence: She was ____ about the test results.
explanation: worried は「心配している」。テストの結果を心配しているので worried が正解。

sentence: We ____ arrived at the airport just in time.
explanation: finally は「ついに・やっと」。ギリギリで空港に着いたので finally が正解。

sentence: Could you ____ me your pen? I forgot mine.
explanation: lend は「貸す」。ペンを貸してほしいので lend が正解。borrow は「借りる」。

sentence: The scientist made an important ____.
explanation: discovery は「発見」。科学者が重要な発見をしたので discovery が正解。

sentence: He ____ the race and won first prize.
explanation: joined は「参加した」。レースに参加して1位になったので joined が正解。

sentence: She takes ____ of her little brother after school.
explanation: take care of は「〜の世話をする」という熟語。弟の世話をするので care が正解。

sentence: The concert was ____. I really enjoyed it.
explanation: fantastic は「すばらしい」。コンサートを楽しんだので fantastic が正解。

sentence: We need to ____ the garbage out every morning.
explanation: take out は「出す」。毎朝ゴミを出す必要があるので take が正解。

sentence: The temperature was very low, so the lake ____.
explanation: froze は freeze の過去形で「凍った」。気温が低かったので湖が凍ったので froze が正解。

sentence: I'm looking ____ to seeing you again.
explanation: look forward to は「〜を楽しみにする」という熟語。また会うのが楽しみなので forward が正解。

sentence: This bag is too heavy for me to ____.
explanation: carry は「運ぶ」。バッグが重すぎて運べないので carry が正解。

sentence: He ____ to call his mother, but he was too busy.
explanation: promised は「約束した」。母に電話すると約束したが忙しかったので promised が正解。

sentence: There was a big ____ near my house last night.
explanation: accident は「事故」。昨夜、家の近くで大きな事故があったので accident が正解。

sentence: She can play the piano very ____.
explanation: easily は「簡単に・上手に」。ピアノを簡単に弾けるので easily が正解。

sentence: My father ____ me how to ride a bicycle.
explanation: taught は teach の過去形で「教えた」。自転車の乗り方を教えてくれたので taught が正解。

sentence: I was talking ____ the phone when she arrived.
explanation: on the phone は「電話で」という熟語。電話中だったので on が正解。

sentence: She ____ the answer to the difficult question.
explanation: found out は「見つけ出した・わかった」。難しい問題の答えを見つけたので found out が正解。

sentence: Please ____ in this form with your name and address.
explanation: fill in は「記入する」という熟語。名前と住所を記入するので fill が正解。

sentence: The museum is ____ on Mondays.
explanation: closed は「閉まっている」。月曜日は美術館が閉館なので closed が正解。

sentence: He's ____ in Japanese history.
explanation: interested in は「〜に興味がある」。日本の歴史に興味があるので interested が正解。

sentence: My grandfather likes to ____ stamps from different countries.
explanation: collect は「集める」。いろいろな国の切手を集めるので collect が正解。

sentence: This road is ____ enough for two cars.
explanation: wide は「広い」。2台の車が通れる幅があるので wide が正解。

sentence: She ____ to help her mother cook dinner every day.
explanation: tries は「努力する・試みる」。毎日母親の料理を手伝おうとするので tries が正解。

sentence: It was raining, so we stayed home ____ of going out.
explanation: instead of は「〜の代わりに」。外出する代わりに家にいたので instead が正解。

sentence: The ____ of the building is very old and beautiful.
explanation: design は「デザイン・設計」。建物のデザインが古くて美しいので design が正解。

sentence: She left home ____ a hurry this morning.
explanation: in a hurry は「急いで」という熟語。今朝急いで家を出たので in が正解。

sentence: ____ first, I didn't like the food, but now I love it.
explanation: at first は「最初は」という熟語。最初は好きじゃなかったので At が正解。

sentence: We haven't seen each other for ____ a while.
explanation: quite a while は「かなり長い間」。しばらく会っていないので quite が正解。

sentence: The bird ____ away when I got close.
explanation: flew は fly の過去形で「飛んだ」。鳥が飛んで逃げたので flew が正解。

sentence: Could you ____ me the way to the station?
explanation: tell は「教える・伝える」。駅への道を教えてほしいので tell が正解。

sentence: He is ____ at playing the guitar.
explanation: be good at は「〜が得意である」という熟語。ギターが得意なので good が正解。

sentence: She ____ a mistake on the test yesterday.
explanation: make a mistake は「間違える」という熟語。テストで間違えたので made が正解。

sentence: The news about the earthquake was very ____.
explanation: shocking は「衝撃的な」。地震のニュースは衝撃的だったので shocking が正解。

sentence: He has ____ finished his homework.
explanation: already は「すでに」。もう宿題を終えたので already が正解。

sentence: She wants to ____ a volunteer activity this summer.
explanation: take part in は「参加する」。ボランティア活動に参加したいので take part in が正解。

sentence: The ____ of Tokyo is one of the largest in the world.
explanation: capital は「首都」。東京は世界最大の首都の一つなので capital が正解。

sentence: He ____ the river to get to the other side.
explanation: crossed は「渡った」。川の向こう側に行くために渡ったので crossed が正解。

sentence: She ____ noticed that her bag was missing.
explanation: suddenly は「突然」。突然バッグがないことに気づいたので suddenly が正解。

sentence: Can I ____ your dictionary for a moment?
explanation: borrow は「借りる」。辞書を借りたいので borrow が正解。lend は「貸す」。

sentence: The concert tickets were ____ out in just one hour.
explanation: sold out は「売り切れた」。1時間で完売したので sold が正解。

sentence: She has a lot of ____ in teaching English.
explanation: experience は「経験」。英語を教えた経験が豊富なので experience が正解。

sentence: This museum has a ____ collection of paintings.
explanation: large は「大きい・多い」。この美術館はコレクションが多いので large が正解。

sentence: Don't ____ your time watching TV all day.
explanation: waste は「無駄にする」。一日中テレビを見て時間を無駄にするなので waste が正解。

sentence: The park is famous ____ its beautiful cherry blossoms.
explanation: be famous for は「〜で有名」。桜で有名な公園なので for が正解。

sentence: I need to ____ sure that I have my passport.
explanation: make sure は「確認する」。パスポートを持っているか確認するので make が正解。

sentence: She ____ to her new school quickly.
explanation: adjusted は「順応した・適応した」。新しい学校にすぐ慣れたので adjusted が正解。

sentence: He wrapped the present ____ for his mother.
explanation: carefully は「丁寧に」。母親へのプレゼントを丁寧に包んだので carefully が正解。

sentence: I completely ____ with your opinion.
explanation: agree with は「〜に同意する」。あなたの意見に完全に同意するので agree が正解。

sentence: The bottle is ____. We need to buy more water.
explanation: empty は「空の」。ボトルが空なので水を買う必要があるので empty が正解。

sentence: She came to the party ____ her own.
explanation: on her own は「自分ひとりで」という熟語。ひとりでパーティーに来たので on が正解。

sentence: The ____ told us to fasten our seatbelts.
explanation: pilot は「パイロット」。シートベルトの着用を伝えたのはパイロットなので pilot が正解。

sentence: I can finish this work ____ you help me.
explanation: if は「もし〜なら」。手伝ってくれたら終えられるので if が正解。

sentence: She hasn't come to school ____.
explanation: yet は否定文で「まだ〜ない」。まだ学校に来ていないので yet が正解。

sentence: He ____ his grandmother every weekend.
explanation: visits は「訪ねる」。毎週末おばあちゃんを訪ねるので visits が正解。

sentence: You can come to my house ____.
explanation: anytime は「いつでも」。いつでも家に来ていいよなので anytime が正解。
